title: Unusual Oddities [DESCONTINUED]
description: cool add-on for unusual prehistory which adds some interessing species
body:
Mod that adds some interessing species into minecraft (Requires unusual prehistory 2)

one of them being zhuchengtyrannus, Babies are sooo cute

the fossils can rarely be found on mesozoic fossil structures from UP2

the zhuchengtyrannus egg can be placed, adter sometime it will hatch

Tyranissed fossil is the one you get from mesozoic fossil structures, these can be used on the UP2's transmogrifier machine turning those into zhuchengtyrannus eggs

Zhuchengtyrannus comes in 3 color variants those being

Default - dark brown redish

Green - (green)

Ying - (black)

zhuchengtyrannus are peaceful besides their menacing appearance
